# Fluence

**Category:** UPS & Battery Storage  
**Website:** https://fluenceenergy.com/

## Headline
Energy storage and controls company relevant to future compute campuses that need more flexible power architecture.

## Overview
Fluence is not a classic data center vendor, which is exactly why it belongs in this map. As compute infrastructure becomes more power-constrained and energy-aware, battery storage and control layers may become meaningful parts of the deployment stack rather than peripheral utilities.

## Key capabilities
- battery storage systems for power flexibility and resiliency
- controls relevant to load shaping and energy coordination
- strategic relevance in future campus-scale compute planning

## Best fit for
- teams exploring the overlap between storage and compute infrastructure
- buyers evaluating future-ready power architecture rather than only current-state rack equipment
- researchers mapping where energy flexibility may create infrastructure advantage

## Considerations
This is strongest as an ecosystem-adjacency profile. It should be reviewed with microgrid, sustainability, and power-monitoring categories rather than treated as a direct substitute for core electrical vendors.
